brute_force.reason: 3439 completed connections to ftp averaging only 141 bytes each — consistent with repeated application-layer login failures
brute_force.evidence: 192.168.1.70 made 3470 connections to 192.168.1.90:21 (ftp), 3439 of which completed but exchanged under 400 bytes — too small for legitimate sessions.
brute_force.recommendation: Review authentication logs on the target, block or rate-limit the source IP, and enforce key-based or MFA authentication.
